action_set_definitions.name: search_books
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the library catalog for books matching a specific title to find their unique IDs and availability status.

title.description: The exact title or keywords of the book.

results.title: The Architecture of Power in the Bronze Age

action_set_definitions.name: get_user_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the user account details, specifically the list of currently reserved book IDs.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the user account.

action_set_definitions.name: place_reservation
action_set_definitions.description: Places a reservation for a specific book on behalf of the user.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

book_id.description: The ID of the book to reserve.

action_set_definitions.name: cancel_reservation
action_set_definitions.description: Cancels an existing reservation for a specific book to free up the user's reservation quota.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

book_id.description: The ID of the currently reserved book to be removed.

example_output.message: Reservation for BK-001 has been removed.

state_description.catalog: A list of book objects, each containing id, title, author, category, and current availability status.
state_description.user_account: Information regarding the current user's session, including their list of reserved book IDs.
state_description.system_timestamp: The current simulation time within the library system.

catalog.title: The Architecture of Power in the Bronze Age
catalog.author: Aris Thorne
